task_objective: Use host-accessible paths from Ludusavi Flatpak backup-preview file-map keys to populate launch-conflict local save timestamps without weakening fallback or exception boundaries.

red_evidence.observed_failure: Four of eight selected tests failed before implementation: production Flatpak host-key data omitted localModifiedAt, an inaccessible redirectedPath prevented originalPath fallback, an OSError on the first absolute candidate prevented fallback, and the zero-success scan emitted no bounded summary.
The adapter did not inspect an absolute file-map key with an otherwise empty file record, so the injected unexpected stat exception was not raised.

design_decisions: For each preview file entry, inspect only non-empty absolute paths in stable order: file-map key, originalPath, redirectedPath.
Deduplicate candidate Paths, recover from OSError per candidate, accept only the first stat success for each entry, and select the maximum mtime across entries.
Keep localModifiedAt absent when no candidate succeeds and retain existing backupModifiedAt and backupPath metadata.
Emit at most one zero-success debug summary containing only the game name and scalar entry, success, and failure counts; never log candidate paths or the nested file payload.
Preserve the existing outer recoverable exception set while allowing unrelated unexpected Path.stat exceptions to propagate.

results.python: 675 tests passed with 86.96% coverage; Ruff check and formatting plus ty passed.
results.frontend: 31 test files and 259 tests passed; TypeScript typecheck, dependency audit, and Rollup build passed.
results.orchestration: Project quality gates passed and no review note deletion was detected.
results.hardware_verification: Deferred until reviewed integration and an explicitly requested Steam Deck packaging or deployment round; no on-device success is claimed.
